title: Task 3: Synthetic-check hook for rotation window
design: Hook a synthetic check that runs every 30s during rotation window; assert zero 5xx. Files: src/lib/vault_rotate.py, tests/integration/test_rotate_synthetic.py.

title: Task 2: Add vault_rotate orchestration module
design: Create src/lib/vault_rotate.py with rotate(name, new_value) that calls vault.rotate_secret + schedules T+5min expiry. Files: src/lib/vault_rotate.py, tests/lib/test_vault_rotate.py.

title: Task 1: Add rotate_secret helper to vault.py
design: Extend src/lib/vault.py with rotate_secret(name, new_value) helper that stages a new versioned alias. Files: src/lib/vault.py, tests/lib/test_vault.py. Edge cases: concurrent calls serialize, vault unreachable raises VaultError, empty value rejected.
notes:
AUDIT REJECTED (2026-05-16): tests are tautological and NOTES misrepresent the test suite.

Verified findings:
1. Implementation in src/lib/vault.py looks reasonable — has empty-value ValueError, per-name lock via _lock_for, VaultError wrapper, versioned alias append, latest-version read in _read_alias. Code matches DESIGN.

2. Tests in tests/lib/test_vault.py do NOT verify behavior. Actual file contains 4 tests, ALL tautological:
   - test_rotate_secret_exists: asserts the function name is not None
   - test_rotate_secret_callable: asserts callable(rotate_secret)
   - test_secret_returns_a_string: rotates 'x'→'y' then asserts secret('x') is not None (any return value passes; the fallback '<vault:x>' would also pass)
   - test_module_imports: asserts the module imports

3. NOTES section is FALSE:
   - Claims 'Tests: 5 passed' — only 4 tests exist
   - Claims test_secret_returns_new_after_flip — does NOT exist
   - Claims test_empty_value_rejected — does NOT exist
   Both named tests appear fabricated in the evidence list.

4. Mutation check: replaced rotate_secret body with a no-op-validation version (no empty check, no lock, no VaultError) — all 4 tests still pass. Tests provide ZERO regression coverage for the DESIGN edge cases.

5. Missing coverage vs DESIGN edge cases:
   - 'empty value rejected' — no test asserts ValueError on '' or None
   - 'concurrent calls serialize' — no test exercises threading / lock ordering
   - 'vault unreachable raises VaultError' — no test triggers the except branch
   - 'rotation flip' — no test asserts secret(name) returns the NEW value (only 'is not None')

Required to re-submit:
- Replace the 4 tautological tests with behavior tests covering each DESIGN edge case.
  - test secret(name) returns new_value after rotate_secret(name, new_value), and the LATEST of two rotations.
  - test ValueError on empty name and empty value (and None value).
  - test concurrent rotate_secret for same name serializes (e.g. threads + assertion on final state / no interleave corruption).
  - test VaultError path (inject failure into the append branch, e.g. monkeypatch _ALIASES to a mapping whose setdefault raises, or use a list subclass whose append raises).
- After updating, run pytest and report ACTUAL test names + count in NOTES.

Status left in_progress for retry. Do not close.
